role_line.description: Role/job title only, e.g. 'IT Project Manager'. Rendered bold on its own line.

metadata_line.description: Pipe-separated 'Company | Location | Month YYYY – Month YYYY'. For the consolidated Earlier-experience entry, drop the dates and keep only pipe-separated company names (kept dateless on purpose).

projects.description: Personal / side projects to include on the CV. Sourced from cv_fact_base.projects — may be reordered, may have tangential bullets dropped, but never invented. Omit the field entirely if the fact base has no projects or none are worth surfacing for this role.

metadata_line.description: Single line under the project name. Free-form; typically 'Dates | link' or just dates or just link. Omit if neither is present.
